Title: One Piece Film: Red
Writer: Brooklyn El-Omar, Tsutomu Kuroiwa, Eiichirô Oda
Actors: Mayumi Tanaka, Kazuya Nakai, Akemi Okamura
Plot: Uta, the most beloved singer on the planet, is known for hiding her own identity when performing. Now, for the first time, she will reveal herself to the world. All of Uta's fans, including the Straw Hats led by Luffy, await.
